rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §63.0013 criminalizes false statements on a declaration of reasonable impediment for voting. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 63.0013. FALSE STATEMENT ON DECLARATION OF REASONABLE IMPEDIMENT. (a) A person commits an offense if the person intentionally makes a false statement or provides false information on a declaration executed under Section 63.001(i).
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the election code provision on false statements.
